ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "daily_rainfall_total" REAL /* Total rainfall for the day in millimeters */,
  "highest_30_min_rainfall" REAL /* Highest 30-minute rainfall in millimeters */,
  "highest_60_min_rainfall" REAL /* Highest 60-minute rainfall in millimeters */,
  "highest_120_min_rainfall" REAL /* Highest 120-minute rainfall in millimeters */,
  "mean_temperature" REAL /* Mean temperature for the day in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the day in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the day in degrees Celsius */,
  "mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Mean wind speed for the day in kilometers per hour */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed for the day in kilometers per hour */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (0-1) indicating data accuracy and reliability */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status (e.g., 'validated', 'pending', 'invalid') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station above sea level */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., 'land', 'sea', 'mountain') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'meteorologist', 'researcher', 'admin') */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the data quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality check (e.g., 'rainfall validation', 'temperature validation') */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the data quality check (e.g., 'pass', 'fail') */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data quality check */,
  "checked_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data feed */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station providing the data */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date of the data feed */,
  "feed_time" TEXT /* Time of the data feed */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_system" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., 'heavy rainfall', 'high wind speed') */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high') */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the alert */,
  "sent_to_users" TEXT /* List of users who received the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_system_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being shared */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization receiving the data */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of data sharing (e.g., 'research', 'public safety') */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data sharing event */,
  "shared_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., 'research', 'government', 'private') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of data report (e.g., 'daily summary', 'monthly trend') */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., 'pdf', 'csv', 'png') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., 'range check', 'pattern match') */,
  "rule_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the rule (e.g., min value, max value, pattern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being validated */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule applied */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation result was generated */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation result (e.g., 'pass', 'fail') */,
  "result_message" TEXT /* Message or comments about the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation_rules ("rule_id")
)
